description: CompositionWhite full sleeve shirt in 100% cotton, with Chinese collar, mid sleeve button with striped loop, embroidery on the chest and left sleeve, flap pockets on both sides on the chest, half length button plackets with shoulder flapsFittingComfortWash careMachine wash in warm waterWash only with like coloursUse mild detergentDo not bleachDry under shadeUse warm ironWith summer here, there is no better way to keep your cool than by opting for a  white cotton shirt like this one from spykar. Fold up the sleeves and pin them to the mid arm button to escape the heat and humidity. Let it hang loose over your light blue denims and team it with bright chappals for a great casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
